_comment: Set plug_type to: tapo, kasa, or tuya. Only fill in the section matching your plug_type.

tapo._comment: For Tapo P110, P115. Get IP from Tapo app → Device Info.

kasa._comment: For Kasa KP115, EP25, KP125M. Get IP from Kasa app → Device Info. Username/password only needed for newer plugs (post-2022).

tuya._comment: For Tuya-compatible plugs. Run: python3 -m tinytuya wizard to get device_id and local_key.
